name: @elizaos/plugin-vertex
description: Google Vertex AI plugin for ElizaOS — Claude and Gemini models via GCP

GOOGLE_VERTEX_PROJECT_ID.description: Google Cloud project ID with Vertex AI API enabled

GOOGLE_VERTEX_REGION.description: Vertex AI region (e.g. us-east5 for Claude, us-central1 for Gemini). Defaults are provider-aware if unset.

VERTEX_SMALL_MODEL.description: Model for TEXT_SMALL — claude-* or gemini-* (provider auto-detected by prefix)

VERTEX_LARGE_MODEL.description: Model for TEXT_LARGE — claude-* or gemini-* (provider auto-detected by prefix)

VERTEX_REASONING_SMALL_MODEL.description: Model for TEXT_REASONING_SMALL — claude-* or gemini-* (provider auto-detected by prefix)

VERTEX_REASONING_LARGE_MODEL.description: Model for TEXT_REASONING_LARGE — claude-* or gemini-* (provider auto-detected by prefix)
